atlas v0.9
返回网页家族 / Back To Families

网页家族 / Contemporary Web Family

静奢生活方式型 Quiet Lifestyle Editorial

更安静、更慢、更像收藏刊物或气质目录的生活方式页面，强调质感与留白而不是强操作感。

历史源头 / Historical Roots

装饰艺术 / Art Deco

适配结构 / Structure Fit

专题长文型 / Dossier / Feature目录索引型 / Catalog Explorer

真实样本 / Sample Gallery

真实网站样本 / Live Website Samples

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

借法 / Interpretation

借这条家族的语法，不只模仿表面 / Borrow the grammar, not only the surface

识别特征 / Signature

  • slow pacing
  • generous whitespace
  • soft prestige
  • minimal navigation chrome

可借语法 / Borrow

  • quiet image-led hierarchy
  • subtle premium tone without loud CTAs
  • refined serif or fashion-led typography

适合内容 / Best For

  • fashion
  • lifestyle
  • cultural brands
  • calmer portfolio shells

不适合时机 / Avoid When

  • high-frequency product tasks
  • dense evidence pages
  • multi-step operations need top priority

页面模式 / Page Patterns

这条家族常见会长成哪些页面组织 / The page patterns this family commonly becomes

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

封面主稿型 Cover-Led Editorial Fold

One dominant lead image or story establishes tone immediately, with secondary stories queued beneath or beside it.

识别信号 / Cues

lead image above the foldheadline-image tensiondeck, byline, caption rhythm

页面模式 / Page Pattern

watchlist

安静收藏目录型 Calm Collector Catalog

A slower, quieter listing pattern where larger images, more whitespace, and fewer cards per row create a collectible tone.

识别信号 / Cues

larger thumbnailsquieter spacinglow-urgency browsing

历史源头 / Historical Roots

如果你喜欢这类网页，往前追会遇到哪几支 / Trace the earlier lineages behind it

1920s-1930s

France / Europe / US

装饰艺术 Art Deco

不少文化、时尚和奢侈品牌网站，会借 Art Deco 的舞台感、对称感和精致节奏。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

静奢生活方式型 / Quiet Lifestyle Editorial舞台叙事展示型 / Stage-Driven Showcase
查看流派 / Open Movement

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格包 / A ready-to-use prompt packet

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

静奢生活方式型 Quiet Lifestyle Editorial

Use a quiet lifestyle editorial family: spacious composition, restrained premium tone, image-first pacing, and typography that feels collectible rather than merely readable.

参考链接 / Reference Packet

继续打开真实站点看细节 / Open the live references

  • The Gentlewoman
  • Kinfolk
  • Monocle
